item.title: Cleveland Homeowners: Stop Spring Thaw Burst Pipes!
item.description: As Cleveland warms up, thawing ground can put immense pressure on your home's pipes. Learn crucial steps to prevent costly burst pipes and protect your property this spring. Watch our video for vital prevention tips. Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/cleveland-homeowners-stop-spring-thaw-burst-pipes.html

item.title: Cleveland Weather Alert: Drain Day, Freeze Night.
item.description: Expect significant temperature drops after today's thaw. It's critical to take action now to prevent costly frozen and burst pipes. Watch our guide to secure your pipes safely. Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/cleveland-weather-alert-drain-day-freeze-night.html

item.title: Cleveland's Rapid Drop: Protect Outdoor Spigots!
item.description: Cleveland temperatures are plummeting fast this week. Learn how to easily protect your outdoor spigots from freezing pipes and costly damage. Watch our video for essential winterization tips! Watch page: https://lakefrontleakanddrain.com/live-video/clevelands-rapid-drop-protect-outdoor-spigots.html
